case_title: BURGER, BRUCE vs. GLOBAL PACIFIC RECORDS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURGER, BRUCE UNSERVED ON DEFENDANT GLOBAL PACIFIC RECORDS, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLOBAL PACIFIC RECORDS, INC. A CONSENT DECREE AND PERMANENT INJUNCTION AND FINAL JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF BRUCE BURGER AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT GLOBAL PACIFIC RECORDS INC, A CA CORPORATION HAS BEEN ORDERED. SEE JUDGMENT IN CASE FILE AT LENGTH FOR FULL TERMS & CONDITIONS THEREIN.
